name: At the lowest flet
description:
You stand on the first flet level.  You are quite a bit higher in the tree than
you care to be.  The elves don't seem to mind the height at all.  As you look
around, you notice several limbs and what appears to be the guest flet.  An
abundance of guards occupy this level, protecting the inhabitants of the tree
from outside dangers.  There is not much light here, but the tree seems to
shine, almost magically.
